## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build or tooling

## Testing

- [ ] `dotnet test HealthGame.Backend.sln`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Not applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused on one purpose.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I preserved backend Clean Architecture boundaries.
- [ ] I preserved frontend library dependency boundaries.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, generated logs, or local-only files.
